ats_utilities.generator.scheme.ischeme_loader module¶

ischeme_loader.py

Info

Defines abstract class ISchemeLoader with method(s). Interface for loading/resolving generation scheme.

class ats_utilities.generator.scheme.ischeme_loader.ISchemeLoader[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class ISchemeLoader with method(s). Interface for loading/resolving generation scheme.

It defines:

methods:
load - Loads and resolves the scheme from dict or path.
is_initialized - Checks if the loader is initialized.
__str__ - Returns the loader as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if component is initialized.

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract load(scheme: str | Mapping[str, Any]) → dict[str, Any][source]¶

Loads and resolves the scheme.

Parameters:

scheme (<str | Mapping[str, Any]>) – Generation scheme file path or preloaded scheme.

Returns:

The resolved scheme dictionary.

Return type:

<dict[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.
